services.title: Home Repairs

services.title: Fence Installation & Repair
services.description: New fences, broken panels, gates that sag. We build them right the first time.

services.title: Emergency Fixes
services.description: When something breaks at 3am and can't wait until morning. We answer the phone.

services.title: General Maintenance
services.description: Gutters, decks, small electrical, basic plumbing. The honey-do list handled.

about.heading: Straight Talk About Home Repairs
about.body: We're an Akron handyman team that shows up when we say we will. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Erin L.
reviews.text: Fantastic workmanship on our fence project. Sergiy was professional and paid attention to every detail.

reviews.name: alesia n.
reviews.text: Called at 3am with a major problem and Lewis was there within an hour. Problem solved fast.
